commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the voice-call webhook replay path so Twilio replays return empty TwiML before provider initial TwiML or realtime stream token generation, with replay regression coverage for inbound, outbound, real Twilio provider, and Plivo behavior.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +200. Total +214 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main verifies replay only after consumeInitialTwiML and realtime buildTwiMLPayload paths, so a replay can reach token generation before event side effects are skipped.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the PR is review-clean and the remaining action is CI/automerge gating plus maintainer acceptance of the compatibility tradeoff.

target.title: fix: Replayed Twilio webhook mints a fresh realtime stream token
